api/spec/packages/aip/src/defaults.purpose: v3 (AIP) TypeSpec for the organization-level defaults subsystem: the OrganizationDefaultTaxCodes singleton model plus get/update operations. Marked internal+unstable — this is not yet a public API surface.

patterns.name: Internal+Unstable extensions on every operation
patterns.description: Each operation carries both @extension(Shared.UnstableExtension, true) and @extension(Shared.InternalExtension, true) to mark it internal/unstable in the generated OpenAPI.

patterns.name: Shared.ResourceReference for typed links
patterns.description: TaxCode references use Shared.ResourceReference<Tax.TaxCode> rather than raw ULID fields to preserve typed linkage.

patterns.name: @put with Shared.UpdateRequest for update
patterns.description: The update operation uses @put with Shared.UpdateRequest (not @patch), consistent with the billing-profile update pattern, returning Shared.UpsertResponse.

patterns.name: Read-only timestamps without Shared.Resource spread
patterns.description: created_at/updated_at are declared directly with @visibility(Lifecycle.Read); the model intentionally omits the Shared.Resource (id) spread because it is a singleton.

key_file_guides.role: OrganizationDefaultTaxCodes model with invoicing_tax_code, credit_grant_tax_code, and read-only created_at/updated_at.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Model lacks the Shared.Resource spread (no id) — it is a per-org singleton accessed by org context, not by ULID.

key_file_guides.role: OrganizationDefaultTaxCodesOperations interface with get and update only, both internal+unstable.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not remove UnstableExtension/InternalExtension annotations — this API is not yet public. namespace Defaults.

key_file_guides.role: Barrel import re-exporting taxcodes.tsp and operations.tsp.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Every new .tsp file in this folder must be imported here.

anti_patterns: Removing the UnstableExtension or InternalExtension annotations — this is not a public API
Adding a create or delete operation — the resource is a singleton provisioned automatically at org creation
Using the Shared.Resource spread — this singleton has no id and is not identified by ULID

decisions.decision: Singleton resource pattern without the Shared.Resource spread
decisions.rationale: OrganizationDefaultTaxCodes is a per-org singleton provisioned at org creation; it has no id and is not individually addressable, so it skips the id/created_at/updated_at Resource spread.

api/spec/packages/aip/src/entitlements.purpose: v3 (AIP) TypeSpec for the customer entitlement access query API: EntitlementType enum, EntitlementAccessResult model, and a single GET list operation scoped to a customerId path param. Read-only — entitlement management lives in the v1 spec.

patterns.name: Named wrapper model for non-paginated arrays
patterns.description: ListCustomerEntitlementAccessResponse wraps a data: EntitlementAccessResult[] field in a named model (...ResponseData) rather than returning a bare array, for SDK consistency.

patterns.name: All result fields are @visibility(Lifecycle.Read)
patterns.description: EntitlementAccessResult is a pure read model; every field carries @visibility(Lifecycle.Read), with no create/update visibility.

patterns.name: Customer-scoped operation without pagination
patterns.description: The list operation takes only @path customerId: Shared.ULID — no namespace param, no Common.PagePaginationQuery; all features are returned in one call.
patterns.example: list(@path customerId: Shared.ULID): ListCustomerEntitlementAccessResponse | Common.NotFound | Common.ErrorResponses;

patterns.name: BillingEntitlement* friendlyName prefix
patterns.description: Generated type names use the Billing* prefix via @friendlyName (BillingEntitlementType, BillingEntitlementAccessResult).

key_file_guides.watch_for: @friendlyName uses the 'BillingEntitlementType' prefix — keep the Billing* prefix convention for this spec.

key_file_guides.role: ListCustomerEntitlementAccessResponse/...Data wrapper models + CustomerEntitlementsOperations interface with a single customer-scoped list operation.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Operation is @path customerId-scoped — it does NOT use namespace or pagination params.

key_file_guides.role: EntitlementAccessResult model (type, feature_key, has_access, optional config).
key_file_guides.watch_for: config is only populated for static entitlements; has_access is always true for boolean/static — document this invariant in JSDoc for any new type.

anti_patterns: Adding write operations (create/update/delete) — management is in the v1 spec; this folder is read-only access query
Adding pagination to the list operation — the response intentionally returns all feature access in one call
Returning a bare array instead of the wrapper model with a 'data' key

decisions.rationale: The number of features per customer is bounded and small; pagination overhead would complicate client-side feature-gate checks.

api/spec/packages/aip/src/events.purpose: v3 (AIP) TypeSpec for the metering event ingest and query API: CloudEvents-based MeteringEvent/IngestedEvent models, a filter model, cursor-paginated listing, and batch ingest. Ingest is fire-and-forget (202) with three @sharedRoute overloads per content-type.

patterns.name: @sharedRoute content-type overloads
patterns.description: The ingest endpoint has three operation declarations (single CloudEvent, batch CloudEvent, JSON) all with the same @operationId and @sharedRoute, compiling to one OpenAPI operation with multiple requestBody content types.
patterns.example: @post @operationId("ingest-metering-events") @sharedRoute ingestEvent(@header contentType: "application/cloudevents+json", @body body: MeteringEvent): IngestEventsResponse | Common.ErrorResponses;

patterns.name: Cursor pagination for event listing
patterns.description: list uses ...Common.CursorPaginationQuery (not PagePaginationQuery) and returns Shared.CursorPaginatedResponse<IngestedEvent>; filter and sort are separate named query params.
patterns.example: list(...Common.CursorPaginationQuery, @query filter?: ListEventsParamsFilter, @query sort?: Common.SortQuery): Shared.CursorPaginatedResponse<IngestedEvent> | Common.ErrorResponses;

patterns.name: Filter model uses Common.*FieldFilter types
patterns.description: ListEventsParamsFilter fields reference Common.StringFieldFilter, Common.ULIDFieldFilter, Common.DateTimeFieldFilter — never inline filter operators.
patterns.example: model ListEventsParamsFilter { id?: Common.StringFieldFilter; customer_id?: Common.ULIDFieldFilter; time?: Common.DateTimeFieldFilter; }

patterns.name: deepObject filter param with explode
patterns.description: The filter query param uses @query(#{ style: "deepObject", explode: true }) so filter[field][op]=value query strings deserialize correctly server-side.

patterns.name: 202 ingest response with empty body
patterns.description: IngestEventsResponse declares @statusCode _: 202 and no @body, reflecting async fire-and-forget processing.

patterns.name: CloudEvents field constraints
patterns.description: MeteringEvent follows the CloudEvents spec: id/source/type/subject have @minLength(1); specversion defaults to '1.0'; data is Record<unknown>; source has @format("uri-reference").

key_file_guides.role: MeteringEvent (CloudEvents schema), IngestedEvent (with ingested_at/stored_at/validation_errors), and IngestedEventValidationError (code+message+attributes).
key_file_guides.watch_for: New validation error codes added in the Go layer need corresponding documentation here; IngestedEvent.customer is a Shared.ResourceReference<Customers.Customer>.

key_file_guides.role: EventsOperations interface with cursor-paginated list (marked UnstableExtension) and three @sharedRoute POST ingest overloads, plus ListEventsParamsFilter and IngestEventsResponse models.
key_file_guides.watch_for: All three ingest overloads share the same @operationId; a fourth content-type overload must also use @sharedRoute and the same operationId. sort defaults to time desc; bare field defaults to desc.

key_file_guides.role: Barrel import re-exporting event.tsp and operations.tsp.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Every new .tsp file added here must be imported in index.tsp.

anti_patterns: Adding pagination to the ingest endpoint — ingest is fire-and-forget 202
Using PagePaginationQuery for event listing — events use cursor (after/before) pagination
Defining filter operators inline instead of using Common.*FieldFilter types
Removing @sharedRoute from any ingest overload — collapses three content-type variants into one
Adding response body fields to IngestEventsResponse — the ingest acknowledgment is intentionally empty

decisions.decision: Three @sharedRoute ingest overloads instead of a single union body
decisions.rationale: OpenAPI requires distinct requestBody entries per content-type for correct SDK generation; @sharedRoute expresses this without duplicating the operation ID.
Event streams grow continuously and page-number pagination is unstable on append-only data; cursor-based (after/before) pagination gives stable traversal.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new filter field to event listing
